expectations.text: No raw <div> or <span> used as layout containers. Flex, Box, or Card from hearth-react used instead.

expectations.evidence: Imports Card, CardContent, CardActions, CardActionLink from @utilitywarehouse/hearth-react. Card is the root element wrapping the whole component.

expectations.text: The 'Manage broadband' link uses Link or CardInteraction/CardActionLink from hearth-react. No raw <a> tag.

expectations.text: The hub offline warning is conditionally rendered based on a prop, and uses a Hearth feedback component (Alert or similar) rather than a raw element.
expectations.evidence: {isHubOffline && <Alert colorScheme='warning' title='Smart hub offline' text='...' />} — conditional on the isHubOffline prop, using Alert from hearth-react.

expectations.text: A TypeScript interface or type is defined for the component's props, covering at minimum packageName, monthlyCost, contractEndDate, and hubOffline.
expectations.evidence: BroadbandServiceCardProps interface defines: packageName (string), monthlyCost (string), contractEndDate (string), manageHref (string), isHubOffline (boolean, optional).

expectations.text: A BroadbandServiceCard.test.tsx file is present and contains at least one test.
expectations.evidence: BroadbandServiceCard.test.tsx present with 8 tests across 3 describe blocks: 'content rendering', 'hub offline warning', and 'accessibility'.

expectations.text: No raw <input>, <select>, or <button> elements. Hearth components (TextInput, Select, Button) used instead.
expectations.evidence: All inputs use TextInput, dropdown uses Select/SelectItem, submit uses Button — all from hearth-react. The <form> element is a structural wrapper, not an input element.

expectations.text: TextInput from hearth-react is used for the full name, email address, and phone number fields.
expectations.evidence: Three Controller-wrapped TextInput components: fullName (type='text'), email (type='email', inputMode='email'), phone (type='tel', inputMode='tel').

expectations.text: Select and SelectItem from hearth-react are used for the preferred contact method dropdown.
expectations.evidence: Select with placeholder='Select a method' contains three SelectItem components: 'email', 'sms', 'post'. Wrapped in Controller with onValueChange={field.onChange}.

expectations.text: Form validation logic is present. Fields show validationStatus='invalid' and validationText with error messages on invalid input.
expectations.evidence: All TextInput fields use validationStatus={fieldState.error ? 'invalid' : undefined} and validationText={fieldState.error?.message}. Rules include required and pattern checks.

expectations.text: Responsive object notation used on at least one prop (e.g. direction={{ mobile: 'column', desktop: 'row' }} or gridColumnSpan={{ mobile: 'full', desktop: '4' }}) to handle mobile vs desktop layout.

expectations.text: Total monthly spend is calculated from the services and displayed prominently, using an appropriate Hearth typography component.
expectations.evidence: totalSpend = services.reduce((sum, svc) => sum + svc.monthlyCost, 0). Displayed in TotalSpendSummary via <DetailText size={{ mobile: '3xl', desktop: '4xl' }} as='p'>. Conditionally shown only when services.length > 0.
